ranks.casual: Play sometimes, just to relax. Prefers calm and challengeless games.
ranks.normal: The most balanced, enjoying an challenge, but also appreciating the story. Usually, play singleplayer games.
ranks.hardcore: Game professional, having videogame as your rotine. Play games to compete, mostly onlines.
